system.name: Nadi Astrology
system.description: Ancient palm leaf manuscript system of predictive astrology with precise life readings
system.origin: Ancient sages (Rishis) who wrote destinies on palm leaves thousands of years ago
system.purpose: Precise prediction of past, present, and future life events written for specific souls
system.uniqueness: Pre-written destinies on palm leaves that match thumb impressions
system.importance: Extremely precise predictions for those whose leaves exist
system.vedicReferences: Ancient Nadi Granthas written by great sages

nadiSystems.name: Agastya Nadi
nadiSystems.description: Complete life readings written by Sage Agastya covering all life aspects
nadiSystems.thumbImpression: Right thumb for males, left thumb for females

kandams.kandam1: General predictions - name, parents, siblings, spouse name
kandams.kandam6: Enemies, diseases, debts, court cases, obstacles
kandams.kandam7: Marriage details - spouse description, timing, compatibility
kandams.kandam11: Second marriage, gains, profits, income sources
kandams.kandam12: Foreign travel, expenses, losses, moksha, next birth
kandams.kandam13: Previous births - detailed past life information
kandams.kandam14: Remedies - detailed remedial measures for problems

specialFeatures: Names of native and family members mentioned
nadiSystems.readingProcess: Thumb impression → Bundle selection → Leaf matching → Reading in Tamil → Translation
nadiSystems.accuracy: Extremely high for those whose leaves exist

nadiSystems.name: Bhrigu Nadi
nadiSystems.location: Various locations in North and South India
nadiSystems.description: Detailed predictions written by Sage Bhrigu with precise planetary combinations
nadiSystems.uniqueness: Specific planetary combinations matched with life patterns
nadiSystems.methodology: Matches birth chart planetary positions with pre-written combinations
nadiSystems.readingProcess: Birth details → Chart matching → Combination identification → Predictions
nadiSystems.accuracy: Very high with exact birth details

nadiSystems.name: Shiva Nadi
nadiSystems.description: Nadi in question-answer format where Shiva answers through Parvati
specialFeatures: Dialogue format makes it easily understandable
nadiSystems.readingProcess: Similar to Agastya Nadi with spiritual emphasis

nadiSystems.name: Kakabhusandi Nadi
nadiSystems.description: Specializes in past birth information and karmic connections

nadiSystems.name: Vasishtha Nadi
nadiSystems.description: Life predictions with emphasis on dharma and righteousness

nadiSystems.name: Chandra Kala Nadi
nadiSystems.description: Specialized Nadi focusing on Moon's position for precise event timing
nadiSystems.methodology: Moon's exact position at birth determines the leaf
nadiSystems.accuracy: Very high for timing with exact Moon position

nadiSystems.name: Shuka Nadi
nadiSystems.description: Focuses on spiritual liberation and moksha path

nadiSystems.name: Brahma Nadi
nadiSystems.description: Covers creative aspects and life purpose from creator's perspective

readingProcess.name: Nadi Reading Process
readingProcess.description: Standard procedure for obtaining Nadi leaf reading

steps.details: Right thumb for males, left thumb for females is taken on paper
steps.purpose: Unique identification to locate your specific leaf bundle

steps.details: Nadi reader identifies bundle matching thumb impression pattern
steps.purpose: Narrow down from thousands of bundles to relevant ones

steps.details: Reader reads initial verses from leaves, asks yes/no questions for confirmation
steps.purpose: Identify exact leaf belonging to the native

steps.details: Once correct leaf found, complete reading is done in ancient language
Reading is translated from Tamil/Sanskrit to native's language
Specific remedies prescribed in the leaf are explained
Reading is typically recorded (audio/video) for native to keep

importantNotes: Not everyone's leaf may exist in a center
Timing of seeking reading is destined in the leaf itself
Leaf will only be found when time is right
Multiple visits may be needed if leaf not found initially
Accuracy depends on correct thumb impression and reader expertise

features.description: Predictions written thousands of years ago specifically for the native
features.example: Leaf mentions native's name, parents' names exactly as they are

features.description: Exact names of native, family members, spouse mentioned
features.significance: Confirms the leaf belongs to the native
features.example: Father's name matches syllable by syllable

features.description: Events dated precisely with year, month, sometimes date
features.example: Marriage predicted for specific year and month

features.description: Previous incarnations described with reasons for current life
features.significance: Explains karmic patterns and current life purpose
features.example: Past birth as warrior explains current courage and aggression

features.significance: Physical link to find spiritual destiny

features.description: Reader asks questions to confirm correct leaf
Specific remedies prescribed for individual problems
features.significance: Not generic - tailored to individual karma

features.description: Events that will occur in future described in detail
features.significance: Allows preparation and free will application
features.coverage: Major life events, turning points, challenges, opportunities

concepts.description: Portion of accumulated karma that must be experienced in this life
concepts.nadiPerspective: Nadi reveals what karma must be faced
concepts.explanation: Cannot be changed, only experienced with grace through remedies
concepts.example: Certain health issues or relationship patterns destined due to past actions

concepts.description: Accumulated karma from all past lives
concepts.nadiPerspective: Nadi explains origin of current situations
concepts.explanation: Reservoir of karma from which Prarabdha is drawn
concepts.revelation: Past births and actions that created current karma

concepts.description: Future karma being created by current actions
concepts.explanation: Free will area where choices affect future
concepts.guidance: Nadi guides on right actions to create positive future karma

concepts.description: Blessings of the sage who wrote the leaf
concepts.nadiPerspective: Finding leaf itself is sage's grace
concepts.significance: Sage guides through predictions and remedies

concepts.description: Destined time when leaf will be found
concepts.nadiPerspective: Timing of reading is written in leaf itself
concepts.explanation: Leaf found only when person ready for information
concepts.example: Multiple attempts may fail until right time arrives

concepts.nadiPerspective: Remedies given by sages have special power
concepts.mechanism: Reduces severity or delays difficult karma

concepts.nadiPerspective: Nadi reveals what soul agreed to experience
concepts.revelation: Why certain events and relationships occur

concepts.nadiPerspective: Major events fixed, reactions and minor events have free will
concepts.explanation: Cannot avoid destined events but can change response and timing
concepts.empowerment: Remedies exercise free will to modify destiny

kandamDetails.name: Detailed Kandam Information
kandamDetails.description: Comprehensive coverage of standard 16 kandams (chapters) in Agastya Nadi

kandams.name: Poorva Kandam
kandams.contents: Name syllables, parents' names, siblings count, spouse name syllables, general life pattern
kandams.typical: Automatically read when leaf is found

kandams.name: Dhana Kandam
kandams.contents: Financial status, family happiness, education, speech, eyes, face, food habits
kandams.questions: Wealth accumulation? Family peace? Educational success?

kandams.name: Sahothara Kandam
kandams.contents: Brothers and sisters count, their names, lives, relationship with native
kandams.questions: Sibling support? Their prosperity? Relationship quality?

kandams.name: Jenmakanda Sampat
kandams.contents: Mother's life, property ownership, vehicles, house, comforts, relatives
kandams.questions: Property gains? Mother's health? Home happiness?

kandams.name: Putra Kandam
kandams.contents: Number of children, gender, names, birth timing, their futures, adoption
kandams.questions: Children arrival? How many? Their success?

kandams.name: Roga/Shatru Kandam
kandams.contents: Health issues, disease timing, enemies, court cases, debts, obstacles
kandams.questions: Health problems? Enemy troubles? Legal issues?
kandams.remedies: Specific remedies for health and enemies

kandams.name: Kalyana/Vivaha Kandam
kandams.contents: Marriage timing, spouse description, compatibility, marital happiness
kandams.questions: When marriage? Spouse nature? Marital happiness?
kandams.details: Spouse name syllables, appearance, family background

kandams.name: Ayush/Ayu Kandam
kandams.contents: Life span, accident dangers, chronic diseases, death circumstances
kandams.sensitivity: Often not read unless specifically requested
kandams.questions: Longevity? Accident periods? Major health crises?

kandams.name: Pithru/Bhagya Kandam
kandams.contents: Father's life, fortune, dharma, pilgrimage, spirituality, guru connection
kandams.questions: Father's health? Fortune periods? Spiritual progress?

kandams.name: Karma Kandam
kandams.contents: Career path, business vs job, success timing, authority, status
kandams.questions: Best career? Business success? Job stability?

kandams.name: Labha Kandam
kandams.contents: Income sources, gains, second marriage, profits, elder siblings
kandams.questions: Income growth? Profit sources? Second marriage?

kandams.name: Videsa/Vyaya Kandam
kandams.contents: Foreign travel, settlement abroad, expenses, losses, moksha, next birth
kandams.questions: Foreign settlement? Spiritual liberation? Next birth?

kandams.name: Poorva Janma Kandam
kandams.contents: Detailed past life stories, karmic reasons for current situations
kandams.importance: Very important for understanding current karma
kandams.revelations: Past birth actions causing current problems
kandams.examples: Past life as king explains current authority tendencies

kandams.name: Shanti/Parihara Kandam
kandams.contents: Detailed remedial measures for all predicted problems
kandams.types: Temple visits, mantras, charity, rituals, gemstones, fasting
kandams.customization: Specific to individual karma and problems

kandams.name: Desa Varga Kandam
kandams.contents: Predictions for the current year month by month
kandams.updates: Can be read annually for current year predictions

kandamDetails.selectionNote: Natives typically don't read all 16 - select relevant kandams based on current life focus

remedies.name: Nadi Remedies
remedies.description: Remedial measures prescribed in Nadi leaves

types.description: Visit specific temples mentioned in the leaf
types.specificity: Exact temple name, location, deity, timing

types.description: Chant specific mantras prescribed number of times
types.deities: Mantras for specific deities based on problem
examples: Mrityunjaya mantra 108 times daily for 48 days
types.benefits: Mental peace, problem resolution, karmic balance

types.description: Donate specific items on specific days
Perform specific fire rituals or pujas
Wear specific gemstones for planetary strength
types.specificity: Stone type, weight, metal, finger, timing
types.caution: Only if prescribed in leaf, not generic recommendation

types.description: Fast on specific days for specific deities
types.duration: Prescribed number of weeks or months

types.description: Rituals for ancestors if ancestor curse present
types.timing: Specific dates like Amavasya or Pithru Paksha

remedies.effectiveness: Nadi-prescribed remedies considered most powerful as they're customized to individual karma
remedies.compliance: Best results when performed exactly as prescribed with faith

authentication.name: Authenticating Genuine Nadi
authentication.description: How to identify genuine Nadi centers and readings
genuineSigns: Names mentioned exactly match without prior information
Past events described accurately without being told
Family details correct including unusual names
warningSigns: Generic predictions that could apply to anyone
Reader asks too many leading questions

genuineCenters.vaitheeswaran: Vaitheeswaran Koil, Tamil Nadu - main Agastya Nadi center
genuineCenters.verification: Check with previous seekers, temple authorities

authentication.importantNote: Many fraudulent centers exist - genuine leaves rare and precious

limitations.explanation: Only fraction of humanity has leaves written
limitations.reason: Leaves written for specific souls seeking them
limitations.acceptance: If leaf not found, not meant for that person at that time

limitations.explanation: Many leaves with similar thumb impressions
limitations.process: May require multiple visits and patience
limitations.timeframe: Can take days, weeks, or years

limitations.range: Varies by center and kandams requested

limitations.explanation: Predictions show destiny but free will still exists
limitations.balance: Major events destined, reactions have choice

comparisons.name: Nadi vs Traditional Astrology
comparisons.description: How Nadi differs from standard Vedic astrology

differences.traditional: Based on birth chart calculations and classics

differences.implication: Nadi more specific but less flexible

differences.traditional: Any person with birth details can get reading
differences.nadi: Only those with leaves can get reading

differences.traditional: Standard remedies based on planetary positions

differences.nadi: Can be expensive due to rarity

differences.traditional: Same chart can be read multiple times by different astrologers

comparisons.compatibility: Both systems can complement each other - Nadi for specific predictions, traditional for ongoing guidance
